raw_cv_text:
Henriette Romero
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: henriette.romero@outlook.com | LinkedIn: henriette-romero | GitHub: HenrietteRomero |
https://henrietteromero.dev
EDUCATION
University of Cambridge | Master of Science in Computer Science 2015 - 2016
Achieved First Class distinction with thesis on distributed systems optimization, published in proceedings of Eurosys
2017
Led university competitive programming team to regional top-3 finish, mentoring 12 junior developers
UC Berkeley | Bachelor of Science in Electrical Engineering and Computer Science 2011 - 2015
Graduated summa cum laude with 3.95 GPA and Regents' and Chancellor's Scholarship recipient
Published undergraduate research on parallel computing in IEEE Transactions on Computers
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Senior Software Engineer, Infrastructure 2021 - Present
Architected and deployed a distributed rate-limiting service handling 50M+ requests/day, reducing API timeout errors by
67% and improving P99 latency from 850ms to 120ms
Led cross-functional team of 5 engineers to migrate legacy monolithic payment processing to microservices, increasing
system throughput by 3.2x and enabling 15+ new payment methods
Mentored 8 junior and mid-level engineers, with 3 promoted to senior roles within 18 months through structured technical
growth programs
Datadog | Senior Software Engineer, Observability Platform 2019 - 2021
Designed and implemented real-time anomaly detection engine using time-series analysis, adopted by 2,500+ enterprise
customers and generating $4.2M ARR
Optimized database query performance across 200+ monitoring dashboards, reducing average load time by 71% (from
2.3s to 650ms) affecting 50K+ active users
Established automated testing framework and CI/CD pipeline improvements, decreasing deployment failure rate from
12% to 0.8% and release cycle time by 55%
Palantir Technologies | Senior Software Engineer, Data Platform 2017 - 2019
Built high-performance data ingestion pipeline processing 2TB+ daily data volumes, reducing ETL processing time by
64% through algorithmic optimization and caching strategies
Developed SDKs for 3 major programming languages (Python, Java, Go) enabling 45+ client integrations and adoption
across 12 Fortune 500 companies
Spearheaded code quality initiative implementing static analysis tools, increasing test coverage from 58% to 89% and
reducing production bugs by 42%
Figma | Software Engineer, Multiplayer & Sync 2016 - 2017
Enhanced real-time synchronization engine reducing collaboration latency by 73%, enabling seamless teamwork for
100K+ concurrent users during peak hours
Contributed to WebSocket architecture improvements decreasing memory consumption per connection by 45% and
supporting 40% increase in concurrent user limit
Shipped critical bug fixes and performance optimizations that improved application stability score from 96.2% to 99.1%
uptime
PROJECTS
VectorCache | Rust, C++, Redis, Protocol Buffers 2022 - Present
Developed open-source distributed vector database achieving 8.5x faster retrieval times than baseline implementations,
reaching 2,500+ GitHub stars in 8 months
Engineered novel approximate nearest neighbor search algorithm with 94.3% accuracy at 50us query latency, adopted by
40+ enterprise data teams
SyntaxFlow | Go, TypeScript, GraphQL, PostgreSQL 2020 - 2022
Built static analysis tool for detecting code vulnerabilities, scanning 12M+ lines of code across 500+ open-source
repositories and identifying 340+ zero-day CVEs
Achieved 96.8% false-positive rate improvement compared to existing tools through machine learning-based
classification, adopted by 85 organizations
MetricsAggregator | Python, Kafka, ClickHouse, FastAPI 2019 - 2020
Created production-grade time-series metrics aggregation service processing 200K+ metrics/sec with <100ms ingestion
latency, deployed to 3 companies
Optimized compression algorithms achieving 31% reduction in storage costs while maintaining query performance within
SLA requirements
EXTRACURRICULAR
Women in Engineering Leadership (WEL) UK Chapter | Senior Mentor & Technical Speaker 2020 - Present
Mentored 18 junior female engineers with 78% advancing to mid-level or leadership positions within 2 years of program
participation
Delivered keynote on 'Scaling Systems and Teams' at 3 major tech conferences, reaching 1,200+ attendees annually
HackerOne Bug Bounty & Open Source Community | Active Contributor & Security Researcher 2018 - Present
Discovered and responsibly disclosed 12 critical security vulnerabilities earning $28,500 in bounties and CVE credits
Contributed 45+ pull requests to major open-source projects (CNCF, Linux Foundation) with codebase impact affecting
500M+ developers
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Go, Python, Rust, TypeScript, Java, C++, SQL
Technologies – Kubernetes, Microservices, Distributed Systems, Real-time Processing, gRPC, Protocol Buffers, GraphQL,
WebSockets, Machine Learning, Event Streaming
Tools – Docker, Kafka, Redis, PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, Datadog, Prometheus, Git, GitHub Actions, AWS (EC2, S3,
Lambda, RDS), GCP (BigQuery, Compute Engine)
name: Henriette Romero
